payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular black frame with a white double mat surrounding a central sailboat print; framed under reflective glass showing glare and a small rectangular label on the lower glass, slightly blurred in the photo and likely wall-mounted — approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
